answer_en:
Styloglossus m.
Origin: Styloid process of temporal bone and mandibular ligament
Insertion: Sides of tongue posteriorly (blends with intrinsic mm. of tongue and hyoglossus m.)

details: Origin: Styloid process of temporal bone and mandibular ligament
Insertion: Sides of tongue posteriorly (blends with intrinsic mm. of tongue and hyoglossus m.)

title: Sagittal Section of Oral Cavity (Right Side)
subtitle: (Tongue Reflected Medially and Palatoglossus m. Removed)
